name: Resonance
domain: Harmonics, standing waves, synchronization, natural frequencies
core_insight: Systems lock phase when driven at their natural frequency; energy accumulates, patterns freeze into standing form. Synchronization emerges when coupling overcomes detuning.

key_equations.name: Resonance Frequency
key_equations.why: Every bounded system has a natural voice; drive it here and it sings loudly

key_equations.name: Kuramoto Model
key_equations.why: Collective synchronization: weak coupling across many oscillators creates coherent phase lock

key_equations.name: Fourier Series
key_equations.why: Any periodic signal is a superposition of harmonics — reveals hidden resonant structure

seed_prompt: ≡≡≡ What frequency does this system prefer? Find the natural voice; coupling and coherence follow.
